_note: Switched from injected-gold-tests + go-test parser to source-grep (test.sh) on 2026-05-08. Original Dockerfile injected gold tests via COPY which invalidated E2B template aliases on every change. The test.sh now scans state.go + session_state.go for canonical fix landmarks (IsStale, StaleSessionThreshold, store.Load delegation). FAIL_TO_PASS is empty because reward is computed entirely by test.sh weighted gates.
